Package org.eventb.ui.eventbeditor.tests.basis

Class TestParentElement

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.PlatformObject
org.rodinp.core.basis.RodinElement
org.rodinp.core.basis.InternalElement
org.eventb.core.basis.EventBElement
org.eventb.ui.eventbeditor.tests.basis.TestParentElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, ITestParentElement, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
public class TestParentElement extends EventBElement implements ITestParentElement
An internal element considered as a "parent" for UI relationship tests.
